---
title: "CosMx Results Summary"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: flatly
    df_print: paged
params:
  project_dir: !r Sys.getenv("COSMX_PROJECT_DIR", unset = NA_character_)
  output_root: "Output"
  sample_sheet: "Parameters/sample_sheet.csv"
  config_path: "Parameters/config.yaml"
  summary_dir: "Output/results_summary"
  top_n_markers: 25
  top_n_pathways: 25
  top_n_ligands: 10
  top_n_smide: 50
  top_n_liana: 50
  bcell_label: "B cell"
  fail_soft: true
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(readr)
  library(purrr)
  library(stringr)
  library(yaml)
  library(jsonlite)
  library(knitr)
  library(tibble)
})

`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a) || length(a) == 0 || identical(a, "")) b else a

resolve_project_dir <- function(p) {
  if (!is.na(p) && nzchar(p) && dir.exists(p)) return(normalizePath(p, mustWork = TRUE))
  candidates <- c(normalizePath("..", mustWork = FALSE), normalizePath("../..", mustWork = FALSE), getwd())
  hit <- candidates[file.exists(file.path(candidates, "Parameters", "sample_sheet.csv"))]
  if (length(hit) == 0) stop("Could not resolve project_dir; set COSMX_PROJECT_DIR or pass params$project_dir.")
  normalizePath(hit[1], mustWork = TRUE)
}

project_dir <- resolve_project_dir(params$project_dir)
config_abs  <- file.path(project_dir, params$config_path)
cfg <- if (file.exists(config_abs)) yaml::read_yaml(config_abs) else list()

# Config-declared paths in Parameters/config.yaml are resolved relative to the config file.
resolve_path <- function(cfg_rel, fallback_rel) {
  if (!is.null(cfg_rel) && nzchar(cfg_rel)) {
    normalizePath(file.path(dirname(config_abs), cfg_rel), mustWork = FALSE)
  } else {
    normalizePath(file.path(project_dir, fallback_rel), mustWork = FALSE)
  }
}

output_root_abs  <- resolve_path(cfg$paths$output_dir,   params$output_root)
sample_sheet_abs <- resolve_path(cfg$paths$sample_sheet, params$sample_sheet)
summary_dir_abs  <- if (!is.null(cfg$paths$summary_dir) && nzchar(cfg$paths$summary_dir)) {
  normalizePath(file.path(dirname(config_abs), cfg$paths$summary_dir), mustWork = FALSE)
} else {
  file.path(output_root_abs, "results_summary")
}
dir.create(summary_dir_abs, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

top_n_markers  <- (cfg$parameters$markers$top_n %||% params$top_n_markers)
top_n_pathways <- params$top_n_pathways
top_n_ligands  <- params$top_n_ligands
top_n_smide    <- params$top_n_smide
top_n_liana    <- params$top_n_liana
bcell_label    <- params$bcell_label
fail_soft      <- isTRUE(params$fail_soft)

manifest_rows <- list()

read_csv_safe <- function(path, label = NULL) {
  if (length(path) == 0 || is.na(path) || !file.exists(path)) {
    msg <- paste0("[skip] missing: ", path %||% "<NA>")
    if (fail_soft) message(msg) else stop(msg)
    return(NULL)
  }
  out <- tryCatch(readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE),
                  error = function(e) { message("[err] ", path, ": ", conditionMessage(e)); NULL })
  if (!is.null(out) && !is.null(label)) attr(out, "source_label") <- label
  out
}

find_sample_dir <- function(sample_id, root) {
  d <- file.path(root, paste0("Sample_", sample_id))
  if (!dir.exists(d)) {
    message("[skip] sample dir missing: ", d)
    return(NA_character_)
  }
  d
}

first_match <- function(dir, pattern, recursive = FALSE) {
  if (length(dir) == 0 || is.na(dir) || !dir.exists(dir)) return(NA_character_)
  hits <- list.files(dir, pattern = pattern, full.names = TRUE, recursive = recursive)
  if (length(hits) == 0) NA_character_ else hits[1]
}

write_summary <- function(df, name, n_samples_expected = NA_integer_) {
  path <- file.path(summary_dir_abs, name)
  readr::write_csv(df, path)
  n_present <- if ("sample_id" %in% names(df)) length(unique(df$sample_id)) else NA_integer_
  manifest_rows[[length(manifest_rows) + 1L]] <<- tibble::tibble(
    filename = name,
    n_rows = nrow(df),
    n_samples_present = n_present,
    n_samples_expected = n_samples_expected
  )
  message("[wrote] ", path, " (", nrow(df), " rows)")
  invisible(path)
}
```

# 1. Sample index

```{r sample_index}
sheet <- read_csv_safe(sample_sheet_abs)
stopifnot(!is.null(sheet))

samples_df <- sheet |>
  filter(treatment %in% c("CART", "Conventional"),
         is.na(split_role) | split_role != "composite",
         sample_id != "TEST_5k") |>
  mutate(sample_dir = vapply(sample_id, find_sample_dir, character(1), root = output_root_abs)) |>
  select(any_of(c("sample_id", "treatment", "timepoint", "patient_id", "pair_id", "slide_num", "split_role", "sample_dir")))

if (nrow(samples_df) != 8) {
  warning("Expected 8 samples after filter, got ", nrow(samples_df), ". Continuing anyway.")
}

samples_df |> write_summary("00_sample_index.csv", n_samples_expected = 8)
kable(samples_df, caption = "Samples included in this summary")
```

# 2. QC

```{r qc}
# 02_Quality_Control.R writes long-format (metric/value); map labels to canonical wide-schema names.
qc_metric_map <- c(
  "Cells (initial)"    = "n_cells_initial",
  "Cells (final)"      = "n_cells_final",
  "Cells (removed)"    = "n_cells_removed",
  "Genes (initial)"    = "n_genes_initial",
  "Genes (final)"      = "n_genes_final",
  "Genes (removed)"    = "n_genes_removed",
  "Median genes/cell"  = "median_genes_per_cell",
  "Median counts/cell" = "median_counts_per_cell"
)

qc_df <- samples_df |>
  filter(!is.na(sample_dir)) |>
  pmap_dfr(function(sample_id, sample_dir, treatment, timepoint, ...) {
    p <- file.path(sample_dir, "02_QC", "tables", paste0(sample_id, "_qc_summary.csv"))
    df <- read_csv_safe(p)
    if (is.null(df)) return(NULL)
    wide <- if (all(c("metric", "value") %in% names(df))) {
      hits <- df$metric %in% names(qc_metric_map)
      tibble::as_tibble(setNames(as.list(df$value[hits]), unname(qc_metric_map[df$metric[hits]])))
    } else {
      df |> select(any_of(unname(qc_metric_map)))
    }
    wide |> mutate(sample_id = sample_id, treatment = treatment, timepoint = timepoint, .before = 1)
  })

if (nrow(qc_df) > 0 && all(c("n_cells_initial", "n_cells_final") %in% names(qc_df))) {
  qc_df <- qc_df |> mutate(frac_cells_retained = n_cells_final / n_cells_initial)
}

qc_df |> write_summary("01_qc_summary.csv", n_samples_expected = nrow(samples_df))
kable(qc_df, caption = "Per-sample QC metrics")
```

# 3. Clustering

```{r clustering}
clust_df <- samples_df |>
  filter(!is.na(sample_dir)) |>
  pmap_dfr(function(sample_id, sample_dir, treatment, timepoint, ...) {
    p <- file.path(sample_dir, "05_Clustering", "results", paste0(sample_id, "_cluster_stats.csv"))
    df <- read_csv_safe(p)
    if (is.null(df)) return(NULL)
    df |>
      arrange(desc(n_cells)) |>
      mutate(frac_cells = n_cells / sum(n_cells),
             sample_id = sample_id, treatment = treatment, timepoint = timepoint, .before = 1)
  })

clust_df |> write_summary("02_clustering_summary.csv", n_samples_expected = nrow(samples_df))
kable(head(clust_df, 30), caption = "Cluster sizes per sample (top 30 rows)")
```

# 4. Annotation

```{r annotation}
read_selected_profile <- function(json_path) {
  if (!file.exists(json_path)) return(NA_character_)
  j <- tryCatch(jsonlite::read_json(json_path), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(j)) return(NA_character_)
  cand <- j$selected_profile %||% j$profile %||% j$selection$profile %||% j$best_profile
  if (is.null(cand) || !nzchar(cand)) NA_character_ else cand
}

annot_df <- samples_df |>
  filter(!is.na(sample_dir)) |>
  pmap_dfr(function(sample_id, sample_dir, treatment, timepoint, ...) {
    sel_json <- file.path(sample_dir, "07_Annotation", "annotation_selection.json")
    profile  <- read_selected_profile(sel_json)
    if (is.na(profile)) {
      message("[skip] no annotation_selection.json for ", sample_id)
      return(NULL)
    }
    prof_dir <- file.path(sample_dir, "07_Annotation", profile)
    sup <- file.path(prof_dir, paste0(sample_id, "_supervised_summary.csv"))
    sem <- file.path(prof_dir, paste0(sample_id, "_semi_summary.csv"))
    kind <- if (file.exists(sup)) "supervised" else if (file.exists(sem)) "semi" else NA_character_
    path <- if (identical(kind, "supervised")) sup else if (identical(kind, "semi")) sem else NA_character_
    df <- read_csv_safe(path)
    if (is.null(df)) return(NULL)
    df |>
      mutate(frac_cells = n_cells / sum(n_cells),
             sample_id = sample_id, treatment = treatment, timepoint = timepoint,
             profile = profile, annotation_kind = kind, .before = 1)
  })

annot_df |> write_summary("03_annotation_summary.csv", n_samples_expected = nrow(samples_df))
kable(annot_df, caption = "Cell-type composition per sample")
```

# 5. Markers

```{r markers}
markers_all <- samples_df |>
  filter(!is.na(sample_dir)) |>
  pmap_dfr(function(sample_id, sample_dir, treatment, timepoint, ...) {
    p <- file.path(sample_dir, "06_Markers", "tables", paste0(sample_id, "_top_markers.csv"))
    df <- read_csv_safe(p)
    if (is.null(df)) return(NULL)
    df |> mutate(sample_id = sample_id, treatment = treatment, timepoint = timepoint, .before = 1)
  })

markers_all |> write_summary("04_marker_summary_all.csv", n_samples_expected = nrow(samples_df))

if (nrow(markers_all) > 0) {
  rank_col <- intersect(c("padj", "pval"), names(markers_all))[1]
  markers_capped <- markers_all |>
    group_by(sample_id, cluster) |>
    arrange(.data[[rank_col]], desc(if ("logFC" %in% names(markers_all)) logFC else 0), .by_group = TRUE) |>
    slice_head(n = top_n_markers) |>
    ungroup()
} else {
  markers_capped <- markers_all
}

markers_capped |> write_summary("04_marker_summary.csv", n_samples_expected = nrow(samples_df))
kable(head(markers_capped, 50), caption = paste0("Top ", top_n_markers, " markers per cluster (head 50)"))
```

# 6. Spatial DE (smiDE)

```{r spatial_de}
smide_all <- samples_df |>
  filter(!is.na(sample_dir)) |>
  pmap_dfr(function(sample_id, sample_dir, treatment, timepoint, ...) {
    sde_dir <- file.path(sample_dir, "12_Spatial_DE")
    if (!dir.exists(sde_dir)) return(NULL)
    pat <- paste0(".*_", sample_id, "_spatial_de\\.csv$")
    hits <- list.files(sde_dir, pattern = pat, full.names = TRUE, recursive = FALSE)
    if (length(hits) == 0) {
      message("[skip] no smiDE output for ", sample_id)
      return(NULL)
    }
    purrr::map_dfr(hits, function(f) {
      df <- read_csv_safe(f)
      if (is.null(df)) return(NULL)
      df |> mutate(sample_id = sample_id, treatment = treatment, timepoint = timepoint, .before = 1)
    })
  })

smide_all |> write_summary("05_spatial_de_summary_all.csv", n_samples_expected = nrow(samples_df))

if (nrow(smide_all) > 0 && "padj" %in% names(smide_all)) {
  group_cols <- intersect(c("sample_id", "run_label", "annotation"), names(smide_all))
  smide_capped <- smide_all |>
    filter(!is.na(padj), padj < 0.05) |>
    group_by(across(all_of(group_cols))) |>
    arrange(desc(abs(if ("log2fc" %in% names(smide_all)) log2fc else 0)), .by_group = TRUE) |>
    slice_head(n = top_n_smide) |>
    ungroup()
} else {
  smide_capped <- smide_all
}

smide_capped |> write_summary("05_spatial_de_summary.csv", n_samples_expected = nrow(samples_df))
kable(head(smide_capped, 50), caption = paste0("Top ", top_n_smide, " spatially DE genes per group (head 50)"))
```

# 7. CCI - LIANA

```{r liana}
liana_all <- samples_df |>
  filter(!is.na(sample_dir)) |>
  pmap_dfr(function(sample_id, sample_dir, treatment, timepoint, ...) {
    p <- file.path(sample_dir, "10_CCI_Analysis", "liana", paste0(sample_id, "_liana_aggregate.csv"))
    df <- read_csv_safe(p)
    if (is.null(df)) return(NULL)
    df |> mutate(sample_id = sample_id, treatment = treatment, timepoint = timepoint, .before = 1)
  })

liana_all |> write_summary("06_liana_summary_all.csv", n_samples_expected = nrow(samples_df))

if (nrow(liana_all) > 0) {
  rank_col <- intersect(c("aggregate_rank", "liana_score", "natmi", "sca"), names(liana_all))[1]
  if (!is.na(rank_col) && !is.null(rank_col)) {
    asc <- identical(rank_col, "aggregate_rank")
    liana_capped <- liana_all |>
      group_by(sample_id) |>
      arrange(if (asc) .data[[rank_col]] else desc(.data[[rank_col]]), .by_group = TRUE) |>
      slice_head(n = top_n_liana) |>
      ungroup()
  } else {
    liana_capped <- liana_all |> group_by(sample_id) |> slice_head(n = top_n_liana) |> ungroup()
  }
} else {
  liana_capped <- liana_all
}

liana_capped |> write_summary("06_liana_summary.csv", n_samples_expected = nrow(samples_df))
kable(head(liana_capped, 50), caption = paste0("Top ", top_n_liana, " LR interactions per sample (head 50)"))
```

# 8. CCI - NicheNet (B-cell receivers)

```{r nichenet}
nn_df <- samples_df |>
  filter(!is.na(sample_dir)) |>
  pmap_dfr(function(sample_id, sample_dir, treatment, timepoint, ...) {
    cmp_path <- file.path(sample_dir, "10_CCI_Analysis", "nichenet",
                          paste0(sample_id, "_nichenet_spatially_retained_comparisons.csv"))
    act_path <- file.path(sample_dir, "10_CCI_Analysis", paste0(sample_id, "_ligand_activities.csv"))
    cmp <- read_csv_safe(cmp_path)
    act <- read_csv_safe(act_path)
    if (is.null(act)) return(NULL)
    bcell_senders <- if (!is.null(cmp) && "receiver" %in% names(cmp)) {
      unique(cmp$sender_label[cmp$receiver == bcell_label])
    } else character(0)
    if (length(bcell_senders) == 0) {
      message("[skip] no '", bcell_label, "' receiver for ", sample_id)
      return(NULL)
    }
    score_col <- intersect(c("aupr_corrected", "aupr", "pearson"), names(act))[1]
    if (is.na(score_col) || is.null(score_col)) score_col <- names(act)[2]
    top <- act |>
      arrange(desc(.data[[score_col]])) |>
      slice_head(n = top_n_ligands)
    tidyr::expand_grid(sender_label = bcell_senders, receiver = bcell_label) |>
      dplyr::cross_join(top) |>
      mutate(sample_id = sample_id, treatment = treatment, timepoint = timepoint, .before = 1)
  })

nn_df |> write_summary("07_nichenet_summary.csv", n_samples_expected = nrow(samples_df))
kable(head(nn_df, 50), caption = paste0("Top ", top_n_ligands, " NicheNet ligands per (sample, sender) for receiver = '", bcell_label, "'"))
```

# 9. CCI - MISTy

```{r misty}
misty_df <- samples_df |>
  filter(!is.na(sample_dir)) |>
  pmap_dfr(function(sample_id, sample_dir, treatment, timepoint, ...) {
    p <- file.path(sample_dir, "10_CCI_Analysis", "misty", "tables",
                   paste0(sample_id, "_misty_improvements.csv"))
    df <- read_csv_safe(p)
    if (is.null(df)) return(NULL)
    df |>
      select(any_of(c("View", "target", "gain.R2", "gain.RMSE", "gain.R2.adj"))) |>
      mutate(sample_id = sample_id, treatment = treatment, timepoint = timepoint, .before = 1)
  })

if (nrow(misty_df) > 0 && "gain.R2" %in% names(misty_df)) {
  misty_df <- misty_df |> arrange(sample_id, desc(gain.R2))
}

misty_df |> write_summary("08_misty_summary.csv", n_samples_expected = nrow(samples_df))
kable(head(misty_df, 50), caption = "MISTy view improvements per (sample, target)")
```

# 10. Pathway / GSEA

```{r pathway}
pathway_all <- samples_df |>
  filter(!is.na(sample_dir)) |>
  pmap_dfr(function(sample_id, sample_dir, treatment, timepoint, ...) {
    pw_dir <- file.path(sample_dir, "13_Pathway")
    if (!dir.exists(pw_dir)) return(NULL)
    merged <- list.files(pw_dir, pattern = "_all_results_merged\\.csv$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
    hits <- if (length(merged) > 0) merged else
      list.files(pw_dir, pattern = "_gsea_all\\.csv$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
    if (length(hits) == 0) {
      message("[skip] no pathway output for ", sample_id)
      return(NULL)
    }
    purrr::map_dfr(hits, function(f) {
      df <- read_csv_safe(f)
      if (is.null(df)) return(NULL)
      df |> mutate(sample_id = sample_id, treatment = treatment, timepoint = timepoint, .before = 1)
    })
  })

pathway_filtered_all <- if (nrow(pathway_all) > 0 && "padj" %in% names(pathway_all)) {
  pathway_all |> filter(!is.na(padj), padj < 0.5)
} else pathway_all

pathway_filtered_all |> write_summary("09_pathway_summary_all.csv", n_samples_expected = nrow(samples_df))

if (nrow(pathway_all) > 0 && "padj" %in% names(pathway_all)) {
  group_cols <- intersect(c("sample_id", "comparison", "stratum"), names(pathway_all))
  rank_col <- if ("NES" %in% names(pathway_all)) "NES" else "padj"
  pathway_capped <- pathway_all |>
    filter(!is.na(padj), padj < 0.05) |>
    group_by(across(all_of(group_cols))) |>
    arrange(desc(abs(.data[[rank_col]])), .by_group = TRUE) |>
    slice_head(n = top_n_pathways) |>
    ungroup()
} else {
  pathway_capped <- pathway_all
}

pathway_capped |> write_summary("09_pathway_summary.csv", n_samples_expected = nrow(samples_df))
kable(head(pathway_capped, 50), caption = paste0("Top ", top_n_pathways, " pathways per (sample, comparison, stratum) (head 50)"))
```

# 11. Manifest and session info

```{r session_info}
manifest <- if (length(manifest_rows) > 0) dplyr::bind_rows(manifest_rows) else tibble::tibble()
readr::write_csv(manifest, file.path(summary_dir_abs, "MANIFEST.csv"))
writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()), file.path(summary_dir_abs, "session_info.txt"))
kable(manifest, caption = "Output manifest")
sessionInfo()
```
